title: limonium sartorii
intro: Limonium sartorii, also known as the sea lavender or statice, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium sartorii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
